title: Minecraft DeltaQuest Prerelease
description: Adds a couple of things from the TBoTV ARG
body: ![Bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54529c42f5ea6c67f0f844d5f4c3043ceea760fb.png) # The single recreation of stuff from the TBoTV ARG Adds: - Noise Gems (Crafting Item) - Noise Gem Tiles (Building Block) - Error Containment Blocks (Decorative Block) - Brightness Blocks (Light Block, On and Off versions) - The Dismantler (Strong Multi-Tool) - Creeper Hearts (Crafting Item, Drops from Creepers) - Data Dasies (Crafting Item, Found in patches) - Secret Easter Egg The mod also forces old Minecraft textures to be on.
